# SpecSentinel

> Catch API breaking changes before production.

SpecSentinel compares OpenAPI contracts, calculates deployment risk, enforces governance rules via specguard.yml, and reviews changes locally, in CI, or in GitHub pull requests.

A product of SDEAshirvad Labs by Ashirvad Kumar Pandey.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://specsentinel.sdeashirvad.com/
- Studio (interactive demo): https://specsentinel.sdeashirvad.com/studio
- SDEAshirvad Labs: https://labs.sdeashirvad.com/

## Official references

- GitHub: https://github.com/sdeashirvad/specsentinel
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/specsentinel
- Documentation: https://github.com/sdeashirvad/specsentinel/blob/main/README.md
- Install: npm install -g specsentinel
